subcodes.first_line: O thou truthful speaker! It behooveth thee to extend the hands of gratitude and praise unto His Divine Presence and to say [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الناطق الصادق علیک بان تبسط اکف الشکر و الثناء الی حضره الکبریاء و تقول
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the concourse on high, @Greatest Name
